author: Lillicrap et al. (2015)
title: Continuous control with deep reinforcement learning
why: DQN buat aksi kontinu — actor-critic deterministik, fondasi kontrol robot

author: Mnih et al. (2016)
title: Asynchronous Methods for Deep Reinforcement Learning
why: Actor-critic paralel banyak worker — dasar A2C/PPO, cepat & ringan

author: Schulman et al. (2015)
title: High-Dimensional Continuous Control Using Generalized Advantage Estimation
why: Trik estimasi advantage bias-variance — dipakai di PPO & TRPO

author: Schulman et al. (2017)
title: Proximal Policy Optimization Algorithms
why: Clip ratio, gampang dibikin, jadi baseline RL paling populer

author: Andrychowicz et al. (2017)
title: Hindsight Experience Replay
why: Belajar dari gagal dengan relabel goal — sparse reward jadi bisa

author: Fujimoto et al. (2018)
title: Addressing Function Approximation Error in Actor-Critic Methods
why: DDPG minus overestimation — twin Q + delayed update, stabil

author: Schulman et al. (2015)
title: Trust Region Policy Optimization
why: Update policy dalam trust region — jaminan monoton, matematis berat

author: Haarnoja et al. (2017)
title: Reinforcement Learning with Deep Energy-Based Policies
why: Policy energy-based max-entropy — cikal bakal SAC

author: Haarnoja et al. (2018)
title: Soft Actor-Critic: Off-Policy Maximum Entropy Deep Reinforcement Learning with a Stochastic Actor
why: Max-entropy off-policy, sample-efficient & stabil — juara kontrol kontinu

author: Haarnoja et al. (2018)
title: Soft Actor-Critic Algorithms and Applications
why: SAC v2: auto-tune temperature entropi, dites di robot nyata

author: Pathak et al. (2017)
title: Curiosity-driven Exploration by Self-supervised Prediction
why: Reward penasaran dari error prediksi — eksplor tanpa reward eksternal

author: Bellemare et al. (2016)
title: Unifying Count-Based Exploration and Intrinsic Motivation
why: Pseudo-count dari density model — eksplorasi terarah ke state jarang

author: Burda et al. (2018)
title: Exploration by Random Network Distillation
why: Bonus eksplor dari error distilasi net random — simpel, tembus Montezuma

author: Munos et al. (2016)
title: Safe and Efficient Off-Policy Reinforcement Learning
why: Koreksi off-policy return aman & low-variance — dasar ACER/R2D2

author: Barth-Maron et al. (2018)
title: Distributed Distributional Deterministic Policy Gradients
why: DDPG + distributional + distributed replay — kontrol kontinu kelas berat

author: Kapturowski et al. (2019)
title: Recurrent Experience Replay in Distributed Reinforcement Learning
why: LSTM + replay terdistribusi — 4x lipat Ape-X, ribet nyetelnya

author: Deisenroth & Rasmussen (2011)
title: PILCO: A Model-Based and Data-Efficient Approach to Policy Search
why: Model dinamika GP + propagasi ketidakpastian — super hemat data

author: Chua et al. (2018)
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning in a Handful of Trials using Probabilistic Dynamics Models
why: Ensemble model probabilistik + MPC — model-based sekelas model-free

author: Janner et al. (2019)
title: When to Trust Your Model: Model-Based Policy Optimization
why: Rollout model pendek buat gede-in data — kapan percaya model, teoretis
